message:
test(fcp-conformance/mesh-node-config-error): pin MeshNodeConfig builder + MeshNodeError Display contract for 11 variants (resolves flywheel_connectors-vf6oo)

19 tests pinning the MeshNode orchestration surface — config
construction + error taxonomy that operator audit pipelines read.

- MeshNodeConfig::new(node_id) initialises with documented defaults
  (admission/gossip/symbol_request/raptorq/trace_capture all
  default(), trace_capture_zones=None)
- sender_instance_id is random per construction (br-reboot-safety
  contract — pinned via 3-way collision check)
- Builder chain preserves node_id through multiple overrides;
  with_sender_instance_id overrides default while preserving node_id
- MeshNodeError 11 variant Display literal substrings:
  - PeerSigningKeyMissing → 'missing peer signing key'
  - PeerSignatureInvalid → 'invalid {kind} signature from'
  - RecipientMismatch → 'recipient mismatch: expected ... got ...'
  - UnauthorizedZone → peer + zone identifiers
  - UnknownPeer → 'no registered peer state' + 'handshake/enrollment
    incomplete' literals
  - UnknownZoneOwner → 'no zone-owner key registered' (br-uxsnk
    audit contract)
  - MissingOwnerSignature → 'missing owner signature' (br-uxsnk)
  - InvalidOwnerSignature → 'invalid owner signature' (br-uxsnk)
  - TraceNotEnabled → exact 'trace capture not enabled' literal
  - GossipDecode → 'gossip payload decode error: <msg>'
  - GossipPayloadTooLarge → 'gossip payload too large: <len> ... <max>'
- std::error::Error trait + Debug non-empty for all variants

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -700,6 +700,13 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_store_validate_source_symbols"
+path = "fuzz_targets/store_validate_source_symbols.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false

 [[bin]]
 name = "fuzz_cbor_decode_recursion_limit"
 path = "fuzz_targets/cbor_decode_recursion_limit.rs"
